session_memory.content: Strategic architecture redesign synthesis grounded in three delegated waves: local .hivemind audit, OpenCode capability synthesis, and selective GSD comparison. Key risks: split state authorities, stale manifests, runtime session ID duplication, backup/profile churn, and markdown-vs-JSON SOT confusion. Key design direction: OpenCode-native session backbone with lightweight always-on governance, command/skill/subagent composition, evidence-rich handoffs, and concise root indices (hiveneuron.json + hivebrain.md) backed by deeper linked artifacts only.
